# Generated Document Library Baseline v1

This compatibility index keeps older bundled skill references resolvable.

Use the current generated document-library and document-center proof records instead:

- `docs/studies/document-library-v2-document-center-runtime.md`
- `docs/studies/document-library-runtime-test-plan.md`
- `docs/studies/doc-library-control-form-hosts-runtime.md`

Do not treat this index as an additional runtime proof. It only points to the current baseline and runtime-boundary documents.
